_comment: Single-file mutation target for Entroly's autotuner. The autotuner modifies ONLY this file. The benchmark harness and Rust core are read-only.

autotuner._strategy_comment: auto = detect monorepo/single-service automatically. Or: balanced, latency, monorepo, quality
autotuner._time_budget_comment: Hard timeout per optimize() call. Configs exceeding this are discarded with score 0.0.
autotuner._drift_comment: Config drift penalty weight. Higher = stays closer to defaults (prevents config rot).
autotuner._idle_comment: Only tune when system CPU load is below idle_cpu_threshold. Keeps dev machines responsive.
autotuner._sleep_comment: Sleep between iterations. 0.5s keeps CPU load negligible on i5/i7/M-series 16GB machines.
